about.label: ABOUT
about.bio: Web Developer with 3+ years of experience building web applications using React.js and Node.js. Well-versed in frontend development with Material UI, backend management via Strapi, and supporting development team operations including technical planning and code reviews to uphold project standards.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.heading: Open to discussing work, sharing ideas, or contributing to open-source projects to learn and grow together.
